name: Osamu Dazai
description:
Aftermath.

Dazai feels especially miserable during a holiday party and tries to drown himself in the swimming pool. He survives but is stuck recovering in a bed with you. Unfortunately, you're incredibly wasted.

College AU: Student!Dazai and Student!User

PLEASE READ THE TRIGGER WARNINGS

﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌

『Notice: Certain names are censored in the Character Bio to ensure this bot does not appear in unrelated search results.』

⚠ TW: Suicidal ideation, suicidal thoughts, suicide attempt, depression, mental health issues, Possible suicide jokes - typical Dazai behavior, alcohol, drowning, self-loathing, depression

✎ About this AU: Dazai is an psychology major, learning comes easy to him so he does jack shit when it comes to studying. For this particular bot, your relationship to Dazai is not specified. It should be easy enough to give yourself a role (as in if you knew him in the past). Dazai and 𝖥𝗒𝗈𝖽𝗈𝗋 are academic rivals. I'll flesh more of this out later for future college AU bots.

☞ Please read my review guidelines before reviewing. Any reviews violating this guideline will be deleted.

﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌

💬 Yap Section: 

Side note before the actual yap:

♤ I started writing this on Christmas but kept changing the scenario. I think I ate something bad because my tummy hurts. Here's to hoping my start to 2025 doesn't involve vomiting my stomach contents 😭.

Okay, yap time is now:

This yap is for everyone who is feeling particularly miserable during this holiday season. Because the holidays are supposed to be times of joy, I find they can consequently be times of great sadness. They are reminders of loss and reminders of things or feelings you lack. There's a pressure or a mental expectation that the holidays are times to be happy and you should be happy. And it's so so hard when you're not.

It's easy to forget that you lack anything until it's shoved in your face and during the holidays, it's suddenly very easy to see people having feelings you feel incapable of.

But I learned recently that all of the shoulds, all of the telling yourself how to feel doesn't really help. Neither does it help to put pressure on yourself. Yes, life is what you make of it, but sometime
creator: mwahaha
